reasoning: This animation sequence depicts the robot playfully mimicking the spinning motion of a wheel.  The animation will focus on a circular motion of both arms, creating a sense of rotation and playful energy.  The sequence will emphasize the smooth transition between frames, highlighting the robot's capacity for expressive movement. The robot's arms will move in a coordinated manner, starting with both arms outstretched to the sides. Then, the arms will move upward, mimicking the upward trajectory of a spinning wheel, before returning to their original position. This circular motion will be repeated, creating a dynamic and engaging animation.  In the final frame, the arms will return to a neutral position, completing the gesture.
